---
title: "Is Australia doing well?"
format: html
editor: visual
Author: Meghna Anand (SID:540360309), Dyuti Shraboni Ghosh (SID:540364743)
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)

wellbeing_raw <- read_csv(
  "OECD Data.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  clean_names()

glimpse(wellbeing_raw)
```

## Executive Summary

## 1. Introduction

## 2. Data Cleaning and Wrangling

```{r}
wellbeing <- wellbeing_raw |>
  transmute(
    country_code = ref_area,
    country = reference_area,
    indicator_code = measure,
    indicator = measure_2,
    domain_code = domain,
    domain = domain_2,
    year = time_period,
    value = obs_value,
    unit = unit_of_measure,
    status = observation_status
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(value),
    !is.na(year)
  )

glimpse(wellbeing)
```

## 3. Exploratory Data Analysis

```{r}
australia_indicators <- wellbeing |>
  filter(country_code == "AUS") |>
  group_by(indicator_code, indicator, domain, unit) |>
  summarise(
    first_year = min(year),
    last_year = max(year),
    observations = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(domain, indicator)

australia_indicators
```

## 4. Relationship Analysis

## 5. Predictive Modelling

## 6. Limitations

## 7. Conclusion

## 8. References
